chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-696 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case For hearing of main case 15-06-2023 Ashfaque Ahmed Panhwar, the petitioner present in person. Mr. Z.A. Channa, Advocate for respondent No.21. Mr. Ashfaque Ahmed Abro, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Asfandyar Kharal, Assistant A.G-Sindh. ***** Grievance of the petitioner was that he was not being awarded degree of LL.B. The degree has been issued to him and he has no further grievance. In view of the above, instant petition stands disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
